title_hebrew: בריינרס יקרים – הודעה חשובה [Brainers Dear – Important Announcement]
body_summary_hebrew: פוסט ברוכים הבאים קבוע לקהילה. מבקשת לשתף חברים. כולל תמונה עם הוראות כניסה. קישור לוואטסאפ קהילה. מציע 3 שאלות: מי אתם, מה הקושי שלכם, מה תגמול לא תפספסו.
body_summary_english: Pinned welcome post to community. Asks members to share with friends. Includes onboarding image with instructions. WhatsApp community link. Asks 3 questions: who are you, what is your difficulty, what reward you won't miss.
cta_in_post: YES – share with friends + join WhatsApp
competitive_relevance: HIGH – pinned onboarding post with 458 likes is core retention mechanism; WhatsApp link is key funnel step
notes: Highest engagement post in dataset. Pinned post. WhatsApp CTA = funnel to broadcast network.

title_hebrew: תזכורת על המפגש השבועי היום עם מיניתי קלוד קוד [Weekly Meetup Reminder Today with Mini Claude Code]
title_english: Weekly Meetup Reminder Today with Mini Claude Code
body_summary_hebrew: תזכורת למפגש שבועי ב-20:30. הלייב של לאתגר הממ"ד – הכרות ועבודה בקבוצות לפי רמה. שעה 18:00 – מפגש Claude Code בגנספארק. שעה 20:30 – Business Mindset. קישורים לשני הלייבים.
body_summary_english: Weekly meetup reminder at 20:30. The Shelter Challenge live session – introductions and working in groups by level. 18:00 – Claude Code meetup in Genspark. 20:30 – Business Mindset. Links to both lives.
competitive_relevance: HIGH – weekly meetup is primary retention mechanic; two-track format (technical + business) reveals audience segmentation strategy
notes: Two CTA links: go.brainai.co.il/claude-challenge-1 and go.brainai.co.il/Claudei-Challenge. Confirms Genspark as challenge tracking platform.

title_hebrew: הלו שוב חודש מרץ כבר כאן! [Hello Again March Is Already Here!]
title_english: Hello Again March Is Already Here!
body_summary_hebrew: פוסט ברוכים הבאים לחודש מרץ. רשימת 4 מפגשים חודשיים בימי רביעי בשעה 20:30. תאריכים: 04.03, 11.03, 18.03, 25.03. 5 נושאים: GenAI Design, Business Mindset, Beyond AI, אסטרטגיה עסקית, מומחות הפקת תמונות ווידאו.
body_summary_english: March welcome post. List of 4 monthly meetings on Wednesdays at 20:30. Dates: 04.03, 11.03, 18.03, 25.03. 5 topics: GenAI Design, Business Mindset, Beyond AI, Business Strategy, AI Image & Video Production.
media_attached: YES – monthly schedule image with dates and photos
competitive_relevance: HIGH – confirms full March content calendar; reveals 5 content pillars for live events
notes: Monthly live schedule image. Confirms 4 lives per month cadence. Topics map to curriculum strategy.

title_hebrew: הלו שוב חודש מרץ כבר כאן! [Hello Again March Is Already Here!] (PDF2 version)
title_english: Hello Again March Is Already Here! (Second instance)
body_summary_hebrew: גרסה שנייה של פוסט פתיחת חודש מרץ עם לוח מפגשים. כולל 5 נושאי לייב: GenAI Design, Business Mindset, Beyond AI, אסטרטגיה עסקית, AI Image & Video. רשימת נקודות.
body_summary_english: Second version of March opening post with live schedule. Includes 5 live topics: GenAI Design, Business Mindset, Beyond AI, Business Strategy, AI Image & Video. Bullet list format.
competitive_relevance: MED – duplicate of ADM-003 content; may be posted in different sub-group or at different scroll position
notes: Appears twice in feed — likely posted in main feed and sub-group. Confirms importance of monthly schedule post.

competitive_relevance: HIGH – replay links confirm asynchronous content consumption strategy; archive accessible to members
notes: Genspark confirmed as challenge tracking platform. Replay link distribution is part of member retention.

media_attached: YES – branded image with week number
competitive_relevance: HIGH – confirms weekly AI news briefing as content format; drives traffic to external site marcai.co.il
notes: Weekly cadence confirmed. marcai.co.il is Eden/Marak's owned media property. SEO + community traffic loop.

body_summary_english: AI news update on Gemini integration in Google Maps. Two new features: Ask Maps and Immersive Navigation. Analysis of capabilities and business implications.
media_attached: YES – Google Maps AI screenshot + product image
competitive_relevance: HIGH – Golan is active AI news curator in community; Google Maps + Gemini is a practical B2B use case Eden may cover
notes: Community leader acting as news curator. Regular pattern. Google Workspace + Gemini theme recurring in community.

title_hebrew: גוגל לוקחים את ג'מיני לגבהות יותר – מודל Nano Banana 2 [Google Takes Gemini Higher – Nano Banana 2 Model]
title_english: Google Takes Gemini Higher – Nano Banana 2 Model
body_summary_hebrew: פוסט חדשות על השקת Nano Banana 2 של גוגל. ניתוח יכולות: Pro capabilities + Flash speed. מידע מבלוג גוגל.

media_attached: YES – Nano Banana 2 branded product image
competitive_relevance: HIGH – Golan is consistent AI news curator; Nano Banana 2 is current (March 2026) Gemini product release
notes: Second Golan news post confirming his role as community AI news curator. Google/Gemini focus consistent.

body_summary_english: Post after weekly meetup. Includes Shelter Challenge links: claude-challenge-1 and Claudei-Challenge. Genspark link provided. Business Mindset at 20:30 mentioned.
competitive_relevance: HIGH – challenge infrastructure confirmed; two separate challenge entry links suggest A/B or cohort tracking
notes: Two challenge links in same post suggests split tracking. Genspark platform confirmed.
